Notes: The Spartans clinch the 2008-09 CAC regular season championship with the win.
The school record win streak climbs to 23. Senior Keli Ward recorded her 600th
career assist with 7:35 left in the game on Donna Figenshu's jumper. York
hosts Marymount on Senior Day on Saturday at 4:00 pm.
Game.Officials: Tiara Cruse,  Natosha Harris,  Eileen Ford
